title: Dynamic Island Mod
description: An Apple-style Dynamic Island music HUD for Minecraft. Control Spotify & more without leaving the game.
body:
# 🎵 Dynamic Island HUD

Bring the sleek, modern aesthetic of Apple's Dynamic Island directly into Minecraft!

**Dynamic Island HUD** is a highly polished, client-side visual mod that overlays a beautiful, interactive media player at the top of your screen. Whether you're building, mining, or PvPing — seamlessly track and control your music without ever tabbing out of the game.

---

## ✨ Key Features

### 🎧 Real-Time Media Integration
The mod uses advanced Windows System Media Transport Controls (SMTC) integration. This means it works flawlessly with **Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Chrome, Edge**, and almost any other media player running on your Windows PC.
* Displays the current **Track Name** and **Artist**
* Shows the live **Album Art** directly in-game
* Features a real-time **Progress Scrubber** so you always know where you are in the song

### 🌍 Multi-Language Support
Dynamic Island HUD natively supports **any language**, including full **right-to-left (RTL)** text rendering for languages like **Hebrew (עברית)** and **Arabic (العربية)**. Song titles and artist names display correctly no matter what language your music is in.

### 🎮 Native In-Game Controls
No more pausing your game to skip a bad song! The mod fully integrates with Minecraft's vanilla Controls menu. Easily rebind:
* **Play / Pause**
* **Skip to Next Track**
* **Return to Previous Track**
* **Toggle HUD Visibility**

### 🚀 Ultra-Optimized Performance
Built with performance as a top priority. The mod runs a persistent, ultra-lightweight background process that polls media data in under 10 milliseconds.
* **Zero FPS Drops** — rendering is highly optimized with no allocations in the render loop
* **No Server Join Lag** — unlike other external-integration mods, this won't slow down loading screens or cause thread locks when joining multiplayer servers

### 🎨 Fully Customizable
Access the ModMenu settings to tweak the Dynamic Island exactly to your liking:
* **Position** — place the HUD anywhere on your screen (left, center, right + offset)
* **Opacity** — adjust transparency so it never blocks your vision
* **Animation Speed** — customize how fast the island expands and collapses
* **Scroll Speed** — control how fast long track names scroll

---

## 📥 Installation & Requirements

This is a strictly **Client-Side** mod — install it on your own computer and you're good to go. Works perfectly on vanilla servers, Hypixel, and any other multiplayer network!

**Required Dependencies:**
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

*(Highly Recommended: Install [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to access the in-game settings screen!)*

---
